narrative:
Brushcreek (precinct in Highland County) has 813 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.6 percentage points.
